build.buildCommand: NODE_ENV=development pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @sweep/api db:generate && pnpm --filter @sweep/api build

deploy.startCommand: echo "[boot] BILLING_WORKER=[$BILLING_WORKER]"; if [ "$BILLING_WORKER" = "true" ]; then echo '[boot] role=worker (billing)'; pnpm --filter @sweep/api billing:start; else echo '[boot] role=api'; pnpm --filter @sweep/api start; fi
